scored_codes.rationale: Atrial fibrillation and atrial flutter unspecified covers both the primary and comorbidity conditions.

Paragonimiasis is a parasitic infection unrelated to atrial fibrillation or atrial flutter.

Café au lait spots are a dermatological condition unrelated to atrial fibrillation.

Fasciculation is a neuromuscular symptom unrelated to atrial fibrillation.
Tetany is a neuromuscular symptom unrelated to atrial fibrillation.

Pre-excitation syndrome is a conduction abnormality distinct from atrial fibrillation or flutter.
Paroxysmal tachycardia is a distinct arrhythmia category separate from atrial fibrillation or flutter.
Re-entry ventricular arrhythmia is a distinct arrhythmia separate from atrial fibrillation or flutter.
Supraventricular tachycardia is a distinct arrhythmia separate from atrial fibrillation or flutter.
Ventricular tachycardia is a distinct arrhythmia separate from atrial fibrillation or flutter.

Other cardiac arrhythmias is a broader category that includes but is not limited to atrial fibrillation and flutter.
